text:

Log:
  Add patch with upstream git commit 2336451ed68d91ff4b5ae1acbc1eca30e47a86a9:
  msgmerge: Fix behaviour of --for-msgfmt on PO files with no translations.

  This fixes building libgtop and gcr from git.
